title: FREE HIV AND SYPHILIS TESTING - 211info
text: SUNNYSIDE HEALTH CENTER FREE HIV AND SYPHILIS TESTING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Sunnyside Health Center is partnering with Cascade Aids Project to offer HIV testing. Other services include treatment referrals; safer sex materials (condoms, lube, prep/pep); and health insurance navigation. 9775 SE Sunnyside Road Suite 200 Clackamas, OR 97015 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Thursday 5pm-7pm Email (971) 361-8801 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Application (971) 361-8801 Español (503) 660-3309 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call to schedule an appointment FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Clackamas County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-7pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Bus line 155, 156, and near Clackamas Town Center Transit Center and stop location 11453, 11454. Max stop Green - End of Line 13132 Services: HIV Testing Navigator Programs Safe Sex Supplies Sexually Transmitted Infection Screening * Syphilis Other Services Offered At This Location: HUMAN REPRODUCTION - OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC OUTPATIENT HEALTH FACILITIES - PRIMARY CARE SPECIALTY MEDICINE - DENTAL CLINIC If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. SUNNYSIDE HEALTH CENTER
